data.content: Plan covers two features: (1) agent-success-tracker.ts module that records per-iteration outcomes (agent ID, exit code, state transitions, success boolean) to JSONL files in the app data dir, integrated into terminal-manager.ts close handler; (2) error-exit recovery in the take-loop that rolls back action state, excludes the failed agent, and retries with a different pool agent — terminating only when no alternative agents remain or consecutive errors exhaust all options. Key design: reuse existing buildNextTakePrompt() step-failure path. New hasAlternativeAgent() helper in agent-pool.ts. Files: new agent-success-tracker.ts, modified terminal-manager.ts and agent-pool.ts.
